hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Attention needed." with title "Claude Code"'

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); vim=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.vim.mode // empty'); project=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir' | xargs basename); worktree=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.git_worktree // empty'); branch=$(git -C "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')" branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // 0'); cost=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // 0'); filled=$(echo "$pct" | awk '{v=int($1/10+0.5); if(v>10)v=10; if(v<0)v=0; print v}'); full="━━━━━━━━━━"; empty="──────────"; bar="${full:0:$filled}${empty:0:$((10-filled))}"; pct_int=$(printf "%.0f" "$pct"); cost_fmt=$(printf "$%.2f" "$cost"); out=""; [ -n "$vim" ] && out="${vim} · "; out="${out}${project}"; if [ -n "$worktree" ]; then out="${out} ($worktree)"; elif [ -n "$branch" ]; then out="${out} ($branch)"; fi; out="${out} · ${model} · ${bar} ${pct_int}% · ${cost_fmt}"; echo "$out"
